name: bzone
description: Deformable-block continuum zones — the FLAC-style zone field view inside 3DEC blocks. Use 'contour <attribute>' for scalar/tensor field maps (stress, strain, displacement, pore pressure, temperature) and 'label <type>' for categorical (group/model/state). 'checkinnerzones' draws interior zones, not just surface.

basic_keywords.description: Show or hide the item without removing it.
Clip the item against the global model clip box.
Set the discrete colour list used for categorical colouring.
Colour entities by a scalar/vector/tensor field attribute. See sub-item 'contour'.
Apply a 3D cutting plane to the item.
Categorical colour/label entities (group, model, state, id, ...). See sub-item 'label'.
Configure the contour colour map (ranges, intervals, colours).
Draw filled polygons (faces) rather than wireframe.
Filter which entities are drawn using range elements (see references/range-elements).
Set item transparency (0 opaque .. 100 fully transparent).

sub_items.name: contour
sub_items.description: Colour zones by a scalar/vector/tensor field attribute.

sub_items.name: label
sub_items.description: Categorical colour zones by group, model, state, ...

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create bzone contour stress-zz checkinnerzones on legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Vertical stress across the continuum, interior zones included.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create bzone contour displacement legend active on
plot item create bzone label state legend active on

notes: Probe live with 'plot item create <type> ?' to list top-level keywords, then 'plot item create <type> <kw> ?' for sub-options. Keyword sets here are binary-validated against 3DEC 9.0.
